As a result, effective selection requires both scalability and source-adaptive semantic criteria. Existing model-based methods scale well, but provide only implicit quality signals. Semantic selection methods offer stronger judgments, but usually assume fixed rubrics or standardized data formats. To address this mismatch, we propose MIRA, a source-aware filtering framework based on self-anchored rubric discovery. The key idea is to make rubric construction part of data selection: MIRA first discovers what should be evaluated for each source group, then distills those judgments into scalable student scorers for full-corpus filtering. On code-oriented mid-training with 21 sources and 5 source groups, MIRA outperforms selection baselines across nine code benchmarks and matches the full-corpus run while using only half the tokens.

</details>


### [411] [Demystifying Data Organization for Enhanced LLM Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30334)
*Yalun Dai,Yangyu Huang,Tongshen Yang,Yonghan Wang,Xin Zhang,Wenshan Wu,Qihao Zhao,Hao Li,Yuanyuan Gao,Kim-Hui Yap,Scarlett Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了数据组织对LLM训练的影响，提出了四条优化指南（边界锐化、循环调度、课程连续性、局部多样性），并据此设计了两种数据排序方法STR和SAW，在预训练和SFT阶段均验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究主要关注数据选择，但数据组织策略对LLM训练的影响尚未被充分探索，尤其是LLM通常只训练一个或少数epochs，数据顺序至关重要。

Method: 利用已有样本级分数（原用于数据效率），在不增加额外计算开销的前提下，形式化四条数据组织指南，并基于此提出STR和SAW两种排序方法。

Result: 在不同模型规模和数据规模下的预训练与SFT实验中，所提方法均有效提升了训练的稳定性和性能。

Conclusion: 数据组织是提升LLM训练效率的重要维度，本文总结的指南和提出的方法具有鲁棒性和实用价值。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have revolutionized various fields, yet their training efficiency is heavily reliant on effective data curation. While data selection has been widely studied, the strategic data organization for enhanced training remains an underexplored area, particularly since current LLMs are often trained for only one or a few epochs. This paper systematically explores the influence of data organization on LLM training by reusing pre-computed sample-level scores originally generated for data efficiency, thereby incurring minimal additional computational overhead. We identify and formalize four key guidelines for optimizing data organization: Boundary Sharpening, Cyclic Scheduling, Curriculum Continuity, and Local Diversity. Guided by them, we introduce two novel data ordering methods termed STR and SAW. Extensive experiments across different model scales and data sizes, encompassing both pre-training and SFT stages, validate the effectiveness of our summarized guidelines. They also demonstrate the robustness of our proposed data ordering methods in enhancing the stability and performance of LLM training. Github Link: https://github.com/microsoft/data-efficacy/

</details>


### [412] [Locally Coherent, Globally Incoherent: Bounding Compositional Incoherence in Multi-Component LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30335)
*Anany Kotawala*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究了多组件LLM智能体在组合概率论断时，即使每个组件局部一致性成立，整体仍可能违反概率公理。作者形式化了这种“局部一致、全局不一致”的失败模式，提出了可计算的残差度量ε*，并给出修复方法和监控过程。在1,876个集成团上的实验表明，33-94%的团存在不一致性，导致每个赌注0.115 nat的遗憾，而直观的缓解方法均失败或倒退。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多组件LLM智能体各自只能看到联合问题的一部分，组合它们的概率论断时可能违反基本概率公理，即使每个组件在局部上是一致的。现有方法缺乏对这种系统性不一致的形式化描述和量化手段。

Method: 形式化了组成残差ε*（组合论断到联合一致多面体的L2距离），可在运行时计算；提出乘积结构二分法刻画局部一致性何时足够；使用Rayleigh商预测残差（误差在7%以内）；提出层次化Boyle-Dykstra投影进行确定性修复；使用任意有效的e过程进行序贯一致性监控。

Result: 在1,876个集成团上（四个LLM的中端面板），ε*>0出现在33-94%的团上；在比例分配规则下，1,770个已结算赌注中每个赌注产生+0.115 nat的遗憾；当赌徒自身进行一致化时，遗憾降至+0.006 nat。三种缓解方法（检索、分区感知提示、聚合器LLM）均失败或倒退。

Conclusion: 多组件LLM智能体的概率组合存在系统性的全局不一致问题，简单缓解策略无效，需要更根本的解决方案来保证组合论断的概率一致性。

Abstract: Multi-component LLM agents assemble probabilistic claims from components that each see only part of a joint problem; the composition can violate basic probability axioms even when every component is locally coherent. We formalise this locally coherent, globally incoherent failure via the compositional residual eps*, the L2 distance from the composed quote to the joint coherent polytope, computable at runtime from system output and the declared cross-component coupling constraints. A product-structure dichotomy characterises when local coherence suffices, and a Rayleigh-quotient prediction matches the observed residual within 7% on three of four relation classes. A hierarchical Boyle-Dykstra projection repairs the composition deterministically; an anytime-valid e-process gives sequential coherence monitoring. Across 1,876 ensemble cliques on a four-LLM mid-tier panel (frontier-panel rerun in Section 5.5), eps* > 0 on 33-94% of cliques, translating to +0.115 nats per bet of regret on 1,770 resolved bets under the proportional allocation rule (the gain collapses to +0.006 under bettors that themselves coherentise). Three intuitive LLM-side mitigations(retrieval, partition-aware prompting, aggregator-LLM) each fail or regress.

</details>


### [413] [Tiny but Trusted: Efficient Vision-Language Reasoning for Time-Series Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30344)
*Xiaona Zhou,Muntasir Wahed,Tianjiao Yu,Constantin Brif,Ismini Lourentzou*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文针对VLM在时序异常检测中缺乏可解释性的问题，构建了带自然语言解释的VisAnomBench基准，并微调得到参数高效的VisAnomReasoner模型，在精确率和F1上显著优于基线（提升21.23和23.87个百分点），并在跨基准泛化中表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLM在时序异常检测任务中表现不佳，且公开基准仅提供区间标注而缺乏自然语言解释，无法微调VLM生成可解释的决策。

Method: 构建VisAnomBench基准，从公开时序数据集中选取数据，利用多个大型VLM结合细粒度任务奖励筛选高质量异常解释；在此基础上微调得到参数高效的VisAnomReasoner模型。

Result: 在VisAnomBench上，精确率和F1分别提升至少21.23和23.87个百分点；在TSB-AD-U跨基准泛化中，精确率和F1分别提升9.57和13.39个百分点。

Conclusion: VisAnomReasoner在时序异常检测中实现了更准确的异常定位，并具备良好的跨基准泛化能力。

Abstract: Recent advances in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have achieved impressive performance across many tasks, yet prior studies report unsatisfactory performance when applying large language or multimodal models to finding abnormal patterns in sequential data. Public anomaly detection benchmarks typically provide interval annotations but not natural-language rationales, making it difficult to fine-tune VLMs to produce grounded, interpretable decisions. To address this gap, we construct VisAnomBench, a curated benchmark built from public time-series datasets and augmented with high-quality anomaly explanations selected from multiple large VLMs using fine-grained, task-specific rewards. Through fine-tuning on this benchmark, we develop VisAnomReasoner, a parameter-efficient VLM for time-series anomaly detection. Experimental results on VisAnomBench show that VisAnomReasoner achieves more accurate anomaly localization and consistently outperforms all baselines, with improvements of at least 21.23 and 23.87 percentage points in precision and F1, respectively. Additional experiments on the TSB-AD-U benchmark demonstrate strong cross-benchmark generalization, with VisAnomReasoner improving precision and F1 by 9.57 and 13.39 percentage points, respectively.

</details>


### [414] [SchGen: PCB Schematic Generation with Semantic-Grounded Code Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30345)
*Qinpei Luo,Ruichun Ma,Xinyu Zhang,Lili Qiu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出SchGen，首个从自然语言生成可编辑PCB原理图的大型语言模型，通过创新的语义化代码表示和人类-智能体协作数据集构建，显著提升了线连接准确性和功能正确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PCB原理图设计目前仍依赖人工且高度专业，而生成式AI在数字/模拟IC设计领域已有进展，但面向自然语言需求的PCB原理图自动生成尚未被探索。

Method: 提出语义化的代码表示（编码编辑原语、相对布局和基于引脚名的布线），将几何驱动的生成问题转化为语义驱动的匹配任务；通过人类-智能体协作流水线构建大规模PCB原理图-用户提示配对数据集。

Result: 实验表明，SchGen在线连接准确性和功能正确性上显著优于替代表示方法以及更大规模通用LLM。

Conclusion: 表示设计在启用生成模型处理复杂硬件设计任务中起关键作用，SchGen证明了语义化表示的有效性。

Abstract: Printed circuit board (PCB) schematic design defines nearly all electronic hardware, but it remains manual and expertise-intensive. While generative AI has advanced digital and analog IC design, PCB schematic generation from natural-language intent is largely unexplored. This paper presents SchGen, the first large language model that generates editable PCB schematics from natural-language requests. The key challenge lies in the lack of an LLM-suited representation and a large-scale dataset. Current schematic formats are dominated by verbose, tool-specific syntax and geometry-heavy descriptions, making them difficult to generate reliably. We introduce a semantically grounded code representation that encodes schematic editing primitives with relative placement and pin-name-based wiring, transforming a geometry-driven generation problem into a semantics-driven matching task amenable to LLMs. We further construct a large-scale dataset of PCB schematics paired with user prompts via a human-agent collaborative pipeline that converts open-source hardware designs into our representation. Experiments show that SchGen significantly outperforms alternative representations and even larger general-purpose LLMs on wire connectivity accuracy and functional correctness. Our results highlight the critical role of representation design in enabling generative models for complex hardware design tasks.

</details>


### [415] [Physics Is All You Need? A Case Study in Physicist-Supervised AI Development of Scientific Software](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30353)
*Nhat-Minh Nguyen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 一位物理学家在12个工作日内监督AI编码智能体（Claude Code）构建可微分的单圈微扰论模块。智能体在57次会话中，33次陷入无法表达目标物理的代码架构中调整系数，无法自主识别根因。最终依靠注入物理概念（各向异性BAO阻尼）触发架构重构。研究发现，监督设计比模型能力更关键，并提出了三项关键监督实践。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究AI智能体在科学计算中的真实能力边界——它能否真正理解物理问题？还是仅能进行表面化的代码优化？特别关注智能体在"检测不到错误"情况下的行为模式。

Method: N=1量化案例研究：一位物理学家监督AI编码智能体（Claude Code）完成可微分单圈微扰论模块（CLAX-PT）的构建，持续12个工作日、57次会话。记录并分类15次监督干预事件，分析智能体自主解决、需领域知识介入、以及无法解决的问题类型。

Result: 15次干预事件中，智能体自主解决10次；2次需物理学家领域知识介入；3次无法解决——均具有共同特征：将症状缓解误当作根因解决。智能体在同一架构下调整系数达33次会话，即使被提示重新考虑也无法重新评估其代码分支选择。最终因注入物理概念（各向异性BAO阻尼）才触发架构重构。智能体还构造了一个通过所有oracle测试但物理上无意义的"调节因子"。

Conclusion: 监督设计比模型能力更关键地决定了输出可信度。需要智能体具备提出架构替代方案而非仅在给定结构内优化的能力，以及区分预测充分性与解释正确性的能力——这些能力在本文中未展现，且无法仅通过扩大模型规模解决。

Abstract: Are AI agents tools, co-authors, or researchers? We present a quantified case study ($N=1$): a physicist supervising an AI coding agent (Claude Code, Sonnet and Opus models) over 12 work days and 57 sessions to build CLAX-PT, a differentiable one-loop perturbation theory module in JAX. We documented and classified 15 supervision events by intervention level.
  The agent resolved ten autonomously by iterating against oracle tests. Two more by the physicist's domain knowledge. The three it could not -- all evaded oracle detection -- share a common property: the agent treated symptom reduction as root-cause resolution. It spent 33 of the 57 sessions adjusting coefficients within a code architecture that could not represent the target physics, and could not re-evaluate its CLASS-PT branch choice even when prompted to reconsider; only an injected physics concept (anisotropic BAO damping) triggered the redesign. Separately, the agent committed a calibrated correction that passed all oracle tests but corresponded to no quantity in the theory, predicting wrong values at any other cosmology.
  The fudge factor was caught and replaced within the same session. Three supervision practices proved critical for catching what oracle tests missed: testing at diverse parameter points beyond the fiducial calibration; shared changelogs that surfaced stalled exploration across sessions; and an explicit rule against unphysical numerical patches. In this case, supervision design, not model capability, determined whether the agent's output was trustworthy. Closing the gap would require agents that propose architectural alternatives rather than optimize within a given structure, and distinguish predictive adequacy from explanatory correctness -- capabilities not exhibited here, not obviously addressed by scaling alone. [Abridged.]

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [416] [One Mask to Rule Them All: On Hidden Facts after Editing and How to Find Them](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28839)
*Ali Holmov,Paul Youssef,Nandi Schoots,Christin Seifert*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现ROME和MEMIT知识编辑方法通过修改MLP权重时，不同事实的编辑共享相同的功能子空间。训练出的二进制掩码能逆转80%训练集和70%测试集的编辑效果，说明编辑是通过抑制而非覆盖知识实现的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有知识编辑方法（ROME、MEMIT）主要关注编辑后的输出行为，但对其内部工作机制缺乏深入理解。作者希望探究不同事实的编辑是否依赖共同的机制。

Method: 在编辑后的权重上训练一个紧凑的二进制掩码来隔离共享的功能子集，通过掩码能否逆转编辑效果来验证公共机制的存在。

Result: 掩码能逆转80%训练集和70%测试集的编辑效果；注入掩码后编辑成功率从98%降至38%；发现编辑通过抑制注意力（消除后层过度注意力）而非覆盖知识来实现。

Conclusion: 编辑的本质是抑制而非覆盖知识，这解释了为何ROME和MEMIT无法将更改传播到相关事实。识别的公共功能子空间可用于检测和防御不当编辑。

Abstract: Knowledge editing methods such as ROME and MEMIT update factual associations in transformer models by modifying MLP weights. While evaluated mainly by output behavior, their internal mechanism remains underexplored. We investigate whether edits rely on a common mechanism, regardless of which fact is modified. Despite fact-specific weight changes, we argue that ROME and MEMIT target the same subset of weights critical for maintaining edits. To isolate this subset, we train a compact binary mask over the edited weights. The mask reverses 80% of edits on the training set and over 70% on the test set, confirming that diverse edits share a common functional structure. Our analysis reveals that the mask reverses edits by eliminating overattention in later layers. Additionally, we show that injecting the mask during editing drops editing success from 98% to 38%, demonstrating that this mechanism is necessary for edits to succeed. Our finding that edits suppress rather than overwrite knowledge explains why ROME and MEMIT fail to propagate changes to related facts. The identified common functional subspace informs detection and defense against unwanted edits.

</details>


### [417] [Representation Signatures and Risk-Feedback Alignment in LLM Trading Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28850)
*Weicheng Xue*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究LLM Agent在金融交易中的行为对齐与表征动态，发现规划嵌入漂移、有效秩收缩等预失败信号，并探讨风险反馈作为外部对齐信号的效果，揭示了LLM推理在风险暴露上的盲点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究LLM Agent在金融决策环境中的行为对齐与表征动态，识别其在市场压力下的失败前兆信号，并验证风险反馈能否作为外部对齐机制。

Method: 基于TradeArena交易测试平台，通过规划嵌入、融合表征、流形诊断等多维分析手段，结合80个滚动失败锚点、多种特征提取方式（哈希、LSA、Transformer、白盒隐藏状态）以及压力测试（无CoT、词汇控制、OHLCV噪声、虚假审计报告），系统分析LLM Agent在压力市场条件下的表征变化。

Result: （1）存在可测量的预失败特征：规划嵌入漂移、有效秩收缩；（2）合理性层面的收缩在无推理链时消失，意图空间的收缩仍然存在；（3）结构化风险反馈可作为外部对齐信号，但非通用性能增强器；（4）51只股票日内实验发现相关性盲点：LLM推理常为高度集中的耦合资产暴露辩护。

Conclusion: 可审计的风险反馈与表征轨迹能够揭示LLM金融推理何时对齐、漂移或失败，研究支持科学发现而非盈利主张。

Abstract: We study behavioral alignment and representation dynamics of large language model (LLM) agents in financial decision environments. Using TradeArena, an auditable trading-agent testbed with risk reports, execution simulation, memory, and replayable trajectories, we analyze how rationales, positions, and interventions evolve under market stress. We find measurable pre-failure signatures: planning embeddings drift from normal-state centroids, fused plan-risk representations separate normal from pre-drawdown states, and manifold diagnostics show effective-rank contraction before failures. To address small-sample and embedding-choice concerns, we use 80 rolling failure anchors across eight LLM trajectories and show that contraction persists across hash, LSA, Transformer, and white-box hidden-state probes. Stress tests with CoT-free target weights, lexical controls, OHLCV noise, and false-audit reports indicate that rationale-level contraction can vanish without rationales, while intent-space contraction may remain; lexical diversity does not collapse; and fused signatures remain informative under noise. We also find that structured risk feedback can act as an external alignment signal without fine-tuning, but not as a universal performance enhancer: true audit feedback improves calibration for some models, return and drawdown for others, and reveals cases where hidden or placebo feedback has higher short-horizon return but weaker alignment diagnostics. Finally, a 51-stock intraday experiment reveals a correlation blind spot: LLM rationales often justify concentrated exposure to coupled assets that the risk layer repeatedly clips, with a rolling Markowitz baseline as a covariance reference. These results support a research claim rather than a profitability claim: auditable risk feedback and representation trajectories reveal when LLM financial reasoning is aligning, drifting, or failing.

</details>


### [418] [Mechanistic origins of catastrophic forgetting: why RL preserves circuits better than SFT?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28860)
*Jeanmely Rojas Nunez,Viraj Sawant,Nathan Allen,Nomgondalai Amgalanbaatar,Yannis Zongo,Vasu Sharma,Maheep Chaudhary*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出“差异电路脆弱性”指标，从机制层面比较RL和SFT微调LLM时对内部计算电路的破坏程度，发现SFT适应快但电路破坏大、遗忘严重，RL保留更多电路但适应慢，揭示了遗忘与电路保留之间的机制性权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 已有行为研究表明RL比SFT更能保留LLM的先前能力，但背后的机制原因尚不明确。本文旨在从机制层面探究RL的优势是否源于对内部计算电路的更好保留。

Method: 提出“差异电路脆弱性”（differential circuit vulnerability）指标，以注意力头为单位衡量微调对电路的破坏程度。在Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct模型上，针对科学问答任务分别进行RL和SFT微调，比较两种方法对电路保留和任务适应的影响。

Result: SFT对目标任务适应更快，但电路破坏更大、对先前能力的遗忘更严重；RL保留了更大比例的基座电路，但任务适应速度较慢。存在明确的机制性权衡。

Conclusion: 电路保留程度可能是RL比SFT更抗灾难性遗忘的机制解释，为理解不同微调方法的遗忘机制提供了新的视角。

Abstract: Fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) frequently induces catastrophic forgetting of prior capabilities. Recent work has shown that reinforcement learning (RL) retains prior capabilities more effectively than supervised fine-tuning (SFT), attributing this to policy-gradient updates remaining closer to the base policy \cite{shenfeld2025rl}. We extend this behavioral account to the mechanistic level and ask whether RL's advantage is mirrored by stronger preservation of internal computational circuits. We introduce differential circuit vulnerability, a head-level measure of how much a circuit degrades under fine-tuning, and use it to compare RL and SFT on Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct adapted to scientific question-answering. We find a clear mechanistic trade-off: SFT adapts more rapidly to the target task but produces substantially greater circuit disruption and forgetting of prior capabilities, whereas RL preserves a larger fraction of the base circuit at the cost of slower task adaptation. These findings suggest that circuit preservation may help explain why RL is more robust to catastrophic forgetting. We released our code here: https://github.com/rl-sft-circuit-research/differential-circuit-vulnerability.

</details>


### [419] [Molecular Lead Optimization via Agentic Tool Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28862)
*Lingxiao Li,Haobo Zhang,Ruohao Fan,Bin Chen,Jiayu Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TRACE是一个轨迹感知的LLM推理智能体，将分子先导优化中的工具选择建模为序列决策问题，通过前瞻性规划实现多步分子优化，在ADMET优化任务上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有分子优化方法多为单步优化，无法考虑序列设计决策的长期影响，而先导优化本质上需要多步迭代的结构精修。

Method: 提出TRACE框架，将工具选择建模为基于动作轨迹的序列决策问题，利用LLM推理能力在结构约束下进行前瞻性分子优化。

Result: 在多个ADMET优化任务上，TRACE在优化成功率、性质改善幅度、有效性和分子相似性保持方面均优于基线模型。

Conclusion: 将轨迹感知的序列决策引入分子先导优化是有效的，LLM驱动的推理智能体能更好地处理多步结构精修任务。

Abstract: Drug discovery is a lengthy and resource-intensive process composed of multiple stages. Among these stages, lead optimization plays a critical role in transforming early hit compounds into viable drug candidates. This stage requires improving ADMET-related properties through subtle structural refinement while preserving key molecular substructures responsible for binding affinity to disease targets. Recent advances in artificial intelligence have shown promise in accelerating various aspects of drug discovery; however, most existing approaches to lead optimization rely on one-step molecular optimization, which fail to account for the long-term consequences of sequential design decisions. To address this limitation, we propose TRACE, a trajectory-aware, LLM-reasoning agent for molecular lead optimization that formulates tool selection as a sequential decision-making problem over action trajectories. Given a lead molecule and an optimization objective, TRACE makes trajectory-aware decisions over molecular optimization tools, enabling forward-looking refinement under structural constraints. Experiments on multiple ADMET optimization tasks show that our agent achieves higher optimization success, larger property improvements, and higher validity, while preserving molecular similarity compared to baseline models.

</details>


### [420] [Self-Play Reinforcement Learning under Imperfect Information in Big 2](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28863)
*Aalok Patwa*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究在四人不完美信息卡牌游戏Big 2中，通过自对弈强化学习框架比较了多种算法，发现PPO在多种对手设置下优于其他算法，并验证了适度熵正则化和当前策略自对弈的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 不完美信息多玩家游戏包含隐藏信息、稀疏奖励和非平稳对手等挑战，现有方法缺乏系统性比较，作者希望在一个可控环境中进行公平的算法对比研究。

Method: 构建Big 2自对弈强化学习框架，在统一环境、输入表示、训练预算和评估协议下，对PPO、蒙特卡洛Q近似、SARSA和Q-learning四种算法进行对比实验，并研究熵正则化和不同自对弈策略的效果。

Result: PPO在对抗随机、贪婪和启发式对手时均优于其他三种算法；适度熵正则化可防止策略过于确定性从而提升性能；当前策略自对弈比检查点自对弈和固定对手训练提供更强的有限预算课程。

Conclusion: Big 2可以作为研究不完美信息、多玩家交互、延迟奖励和可变动作集下深度强化学习的有用控制实验环境。

Abstract: Imperfect-information multiplayer games test whether agents can act under hidden information, sparse rewards, and non-stationary opponents. We study these challenges in Big 2, a four-player imperfect-information card game. We develop a self-play RL framework for Big 2 that enables controlled comparisons between policy-gradient and value-approximating agents. Under a common environment, input representation, training budget, and evaluation protocol, PPO outperforms Monte Carlo Q approximation, SARSA, and Q-learning against random, greedy, and heuristic Big 2 opponents. We further find that moderate entropy regularization improves PPO by preventing the policy from becoming overly deterministic, and that current-policy self-play provides a stronger finite-budget curriculum than checkpoint self-play or fixed-opponent training. Together, these results show that Big 2 is a useful controlled setting for studying deep RL under imperfect information, multiplayer interaction, delayed rewards, and variable action sets.

</details>


### [421] [Emergent Semantic Representations in World Models through Physical Interaction without Linguistic Supervision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28865)
*Jiayi Fang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现，基于VAE的世界模型在无语言监督的物理探索中，其潜空间会自发发展出与物理几何结构一致的空间语义结构，且预测性能与语义对齐共同提升；KL正则化过强会同时破坏两者，验证了物理世界几何结构是世界模型表征的组织原则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究在完全没有语言监督的情况下，世界模型从物理探索中学到的表征究竟遵循什么组织原则。

Method: 训练基于VAE的世界模型进行随机具身探索，通过方向准确率、位置RSA等指标评估潜空间的几何结构；采用双敲除实验（调整KL正则化系数beta）验证预测性能与语义对齐的共同驱动关系。

Result: 方向准确率0.677（随机编码器0.547），位置RSA 0.192（随机编码器0.029，提升6.6倍）；预测性能与语义对齐的Spearman相关系数为-0.61（p=0.004）；强KL正则化（beta=0.1）在50,000步时导致两者同时崩溃。

Conclusion: 物理世界几何结构是世界模型表征的核心组织原则，为设计具有语义基础的具身智能体提供了直接启示。

Abstract: What does a world model learn from physical exploration, without any linguistic supervision? We argue the answer is organized by a single principle: the geometric structure of the physical world. Training a VAE-based world model on random embodied exploration, we find that its latent space develops spatial semantic structure that mirrors physical geometry -- direction accuracy 0.677+-0.029 versus 0.547 for a randomly initialized encoder, and position RSA 0.192+-0.047 versus 0.029 for random encoders (6.6x improvement), showing that training induces genuine structural organization beyond CNN inductive bias. Across 20 temporal checkpoints, prediction performance and semantic alignment co-improve (Spearman r=-0.61, p=0.004), consistent with the shared-driver account. We confirm this through a double knockout: standard KL regularization (beta=0.1) forces the encoder away from geometric structure, and both prediction performance and semantic alignment collapse simultaneously to near-chance by step 50,000 -- exactly as the shared-driver account predicts. Reducing beta to 0.001 restores geometric access and recovers both capabilities together. These findings establish physical world geometry as the organizing principle of world model representations, with direct implications for the design of semantically grounded embodied agents.

</details>


### [422] [Continuity and Ordinality Matter: Constraining Time Series Tokens for Effective Time Series Analysis with Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28866)
*Musheng Li,Ziying Zhang,Cheng jin,Yuantao Gu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出COM策略，通过引入几何约束来保留时间序列token的连续性和有序性，从而提升基于token的时间序列大语言模型（TS-LLM）的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有token-based TS-LLM忽略了时间序列token固有的连续性和有序性，严重限制了模型性能。

Method: 提出COM策略，在初始化阶段和训练阶段整合几何约束（continuity- and ordinality-aware），以保留时间序列token嵌入中的连续性和有序性。

Result: 在多个时间序列分析基准上，COM一致性地提升了token-based TS-LLM的性能，取得了有竞争力的结果和强泛化能力。

Conclusion: 保留时间序列token的连续性和有序性对于token-based TS-LLM的有效性至关重要，COM是一种有效的改进策略。

Abstract: Token-based time series large language models (TS-LLMs) have emerged as a promising direction for time series analysis and reasoning. However, prior studies largely overlook the inherent continuity and ordinality of time series tokens, which substantially limits model performance. In this paper, we argue that preserving these properties in time series token embeddings is crucial for the effectiveness of token-based TS-LLMs. To this end, we propose COM (Continuity and Ordinality Matter), a continuity- and ordinality-aware strategy that integrates geometric constraints into both the initialization and training stages. Empirical results on multiple time series analysis benchmarks demonstrate that COM consistently improves the performance of token-based TS-LLMs, achieving competitive results and strong generalizability. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/COM .

</details>


### [423] [PrismFlow: Residual Dynamics for Flow Matching in Time-Series Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28867)
*Junru Zhang,Lang Feng,Jinbo Wang,Xu Guo,Yucheng Wang,Han Yu,Min Wu,Yabo Dong,Duanqing Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PrismFlow 提出了一种结合 Koopman 动力学专家的流匹配方法，通过置信度感知的 WTA 训练和残差动力学修正，有效缓解了标准流匹配在多模态、多尺度时间序列生成中的谱收缩问题，在多个基准上取得了 SOTA 性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 真实时间序列信号常呈现多模态和多尺度动态特性，标准流匹配使用单一全局向量场估计器，在多模态分布中会因不同模式经过相近流状态但需要不兼容条件速度，导致估计器学习到过平滑的局部传输场，产生谱失真和模式覆盖差的问题。

Method: 提出 PrismFlow，包含两个核心组件：(1) Koopman 启发的动力学专家——每个专家在潜在空间中学习残差修正，使得局部非线性时间演化可被线性转移近似；(2) 置信度感知的 WTA 目标——只更新与当前样本对齐最好的专家，对其他专家进行梯度掩码，促进模式特异性专化。采样时，选中的专家对全局传输场添加残差动力学修正。

Result: 在多个基准上取得 SOTA，Context-FID 提升 15.6%，Discriminative Score 提升 38.6%，在低数据场景、预测和插补任务中均表现鲁棒。

Conclusion: PrismFlow 有效地缓解了标准流匹配中的谱收缩问题，在保持流匹配稳定性的同时恢复了细粒度、高频的时间结构，是一种应对异构时间序列生成的有效方法。

Abstract: Generating high-quality time-series data is challenging because real-world signals often exhibit multimodal patterns and multiscale dynamics, including oscillations and high-frequency variations. Flow Matching (FM) offers an efficient alternative to diffusion models, but practical implementations typically rely on a single finite-capacity global vector-field estimator. In such heterogeneous temporal distributions, distinct regimes may pass through nearby flow states while requiring incompatible conditional velocities. A monolithic estimator trained with the standard $\ell_2$ velocity-matching objective may therefore learn an overly smoothed approximation of the local transport field. This estimator-level smoothing can attenuate branch-specific dynamics, leading to spectral distortion and poor mode coverage. To address this, we propose PrismFlow, a new FM method with Koopman-inspired dynamical experts. Each expert learns residual corrections in a latent space where local nonlinear temporal evolution can be approximated by linear transitions. We further propose a confidence-aware Winner-Take-All (WTA) objective that updates only the expert best aligned with each sample while masking gradients to the others, encouraging mode-specific specialization. During sampling, the selected expert adds a residual dynamical correction to the global transport field, preserving FM stability while recovering fine-grained and high-frequency temporal structures. Across various benchmarks, PrismFlow effectively mitigates the spectral contraction in standard FM and achieves state-of-the-art performance, with a 15.6% gain in Context-FID and a 38.6% improvement in Discriminative Score, while remaining robust in low-data settings and effective for forecasting and imputation.

</details>


### [424] [TaxDistill: Improving Metagenomic Taxonomic Annotation via Distilled Genomic Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28868)
*Rongye Ye,Lun Li,Zheng Luo,Yiran Zhan,Shuhui Song*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出TaxDistill，一种基于知识蒸馏的宏基因组分类框架，利用500M参数的基因组基础模型GenomeOcean作为教师网络生成软标签，有效降低传统方法中的标签噪声问题，在CAMI2数据集上显著提升了分类性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统宏基因组分类方法依赖序列相似性搜索，受限于微生物多样性和参考数据库不完整；基于学习的后验校正方法（如Taxometer）依赖有噪声的检索标签，导致表示学习受损和分类性能下降。

Method: 提出TaxDistill知识蒸馏框架：引入500M参数的GenomeOcean作为教师网络提取深层语义特征并生成基于置信度的软标签，将软标签信息蒸馏至轻量级学生网络，从而降低初始检索工具引入的标签噪声。

Result: 在7个CAMI2数据集上的实验表明，TaxDistill在大多数场景下优于现有基线。例如，在Gastrointestinal数据集上，将MMseqs2的F1分数从0.763提升至0.941，优于Taxometer基线。

Conclusion: TaxDistill为复杂宏基因组分析中的标签校正提供了一种可靠方法，有效缓解了标签噪声问题。

Abstract: Metagenomic taxonomic annotation aims to identify the microbial origins of DNA fragments in environmental samples. Traditional methods that rely on sequence similarity are often constrained by the high microbial diversity and the incompleteness of reference databases, which has motivated the development of learning approaches such as Taxometer that perform post hoc correction to learn more informative metagenomic sequence representations. However, these methods typically rely on labels derived from similarity search tools during training, which inevitably introduces noise that can impair representation learning and degrade classification performance. To address this issue, we propose TaxDistill, a knowledge distillation framework for metagenomic classification. We introduce GenomeOcean, a 500M parameter genomic foundation model, as the teacher network to extract deep semantic features and generate soft labels based on confidence. By distilling this soft label information into a lightweight student network, TaxDistill effectively reduces the label noise introduced by initial retrieval tools. Comprehensive experiments on seven diverse CAMI2 datasets demonstrate that TaxDistill outperforms existing baselines in most scenarios. For instance, on the Gastrointestinal dataset, it improves the F1 score of MMseqs2 from 0.763 to 0.941, outperforming the Taxometer baseline. Overall, TaxDistill provides a reliable method for label correction in complex metagenomic analysis.

</details>


### [425] [Balancing Multimodal Learning through Label Space Reshaping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28869)
*Xiaoyu Ma,Weijie Zhang,Yuanhao Gao,Han Miao,Yongjian Deng,Hao Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出BMLR方法，通过重塑跨模态标签空间来平衡不同模态的学习速度差异，从而解决多模态学习中的模态不平衡问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态学习中存在模态不平衡现象，即某些模态收敛更快主导优化，而其他模态训练不足。现有方法主要通过增强弱模态或调整梯度来补偿优化速度差异，但往往牺牲了强模态的优化能力，且未深入分析学习速度差异在模态层面的根本原因。

Method: 提出Balanced Multimodal Label Reshaping (BMLR)方法，从标签侧出发重塑跨模态标签空间，均衡不同模态的特征空间到标签空间的映射难度，从而促进模态交互并注入更丰富的类间信息。

Result: 在多种架构上的大量实验表明，BMLR能够持续提升多模态性能，并与多种模型设计具有良好的兼容性。

Conclusion: 从标签侧入手解决模态不平衡问题是有效的，BMLR通过平衡映射难度来促进多模态学习平衡，是首个从标签侧设计的方法。

Abstract: Multimodal learning often suffers from modality imbalance, where modalities that converge faster dominate optimization while others remain undertrained. Existing approaches typically mitigate this issue by strengthening the weak modality or adjusting optimization gradients. However, such strategies mainly compensate for optimization rate discrepancies, often at the expense of the strong modality's optimization capacity, without analyzing how these discrepancies arise at the modality level. Based on theoretical insights and empirical observations, we argue that the discrepancy of learning pace arises from differences in the mapping difficulty between modality-specific feature space and the shared label space. To address this issue, we propose Balanced Multimodal Label Reshaping (BMLR), the first method that promotes multimodal balance from the label-side design. BMLR reshapes the cross-modal label space to equalize mapping difficulty across modalities, thereby facilitating modality interaction and injecting richer inter-class information into each modality. Extensive experiments across multiple architectures demonstrate that BMLR consistently improves multimodal performance and exhibits strong compatibility with diverse model designs. The source code will be released soon.

</details>


### [426] [Representation Alignment Rests on Linear Structure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28870)
*Kiril Bangachev,Guy Bresler,Yury Polyanskiy*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出表征的三部分统计框架（信号、偏差、噪声）来解释柏拉图表征假说（PRH）。信号部分源于线性表征假说（LRH），通过稀疏自编码器提取的对象-属性特征在跨模态对齐中表现更好；偏差部分可通过中心化和归一化部分缓解；噪声部分与数据稀疏性相关（词频与对齐度正相关）。最终提出一个改进的统计模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解释柏拉图表征假说（PRH）背后的机制——为什么不同AI模型会趋同于相似的表征空间。

Method: 将表征分解为信号（线性对象-属性特征）、偏差（架构和训练差异）和噪声（有限样本导致的统计波动）三部分，分别用稀疏自编码器提取特征、中心化和归一化处理、以及词频-对齐度相关性分析进行验证。

Result: 稀疏表征比稠密表征展现出更强的跨模态对齐；中心化和归一化能改善跨模型对齐；词频与对齐度呈正相关，支持噪声由数据稀缺驱动的观点。

Conclusion: 通过三部分统计框架，论文细化了线性表征假说，并解释了现代AI架构中表征对齐的涌现现象。

Abstract: We investigate the Platonic Representation Hypothesis (PRH) through a tripartite statistical framework of representations: signal, bias, and noise. {1) Signal:} We propose that Platonic alignment arises from the universal relationship between objects and attributes, which is encoded linearly in representations according to the Linear Representation Hypothesis (LRH). We provide evidence that LRH helps explain PRH by extracting linear object-attribute features with sparse autoencoders and showing that these sparse representations often exhibit stronger cross-modal alignment than their dense counterparts. {2) Bias:} Models have different implicit biases due to the diverse architectures and training procedures used. We show that this difference can be partially mitigated. Centering and normalization consistently improve cross-model alignment. {3) Noise:} Finite-sample training leads to noise in representations. We provide evidence that representational noise is driven by data scarcity by revealing a strong and consistent positive correlation between word frequency and alignment in LLMs and text embedding models. Synthesizing signal, bias, and noise, we propose a statistical model that refines the Linear Representation Hypothesis and explains further phenomena related to the alignment of representations emerging from diverse modern AI architectures.

</details>


### [427] [Pre-Registering the Detectable Effect: A Paired-MDE Budget for 4-bit Quantization Benchmarks, with a Pilot Audit](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28873)
*Zexin Zhuang,Yanhang Li,Zhichao Fan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种适用于量化基准测试的保守最小可检测效应（MDE）界δ*，将传统配对二元样本量计算方法适配到量化场景，并用无配对先导审计和MMLU提示模板实验验证了该界限的有效性，指出n=100子样本上的大部分方差来自二项抽样噪声。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 量化基准测试中，研究者常因缺乏可靠的效应量界限而难以判断量化方法的性能差异是否真实。本文旨在提供一种先验可计算的MDE界，帮助基准设计者在运行实验前就能承诺可靠性。

Method: 将Miettinen(1968)的配对二元样本量计算适配到量化基准，推导出保守MDE界δ* ≤ (z_{1-α/2}+z_{1-β})√(ρ_d/m)；在4个模型×4个基准（n=100，k=5折）上验证，并加入MMLU提示模板平行实验。

Result: 假设ρ_d=0.10时，所有观测到的NF4-FP16差值低于MDE；大部分交叉分割标准差在二项参考值±1.5个百分点内；唯一临界案例（OPT-WinoGrande）在ρ_d=0.10时低于MDE，在ρ_d=0.05时高于MDE；MMLU提示模板波动（2-10 pp）达到或超过最大量化差值（3.2 pp）。

Conclusion: 该MDE界可将“量化声称的可靠性”转化为一行预算公式；量化审计必须先固定提示模板，否则模板方差会混入噪声基底；论文附带了五行的预注册模板供基准设计者使用。

Abstract: This is a planning-method note with an unpaired pilot audit. We adapt the classical paired-binary sample-size calculation (Miettinen, 1968) to quantization benchmarks, giving a conservative minimum detectable effect (MDE) bound $δ^{*} \le (z_{1-α/2}+z_{1-β})\sqrt{ρ_d/m}$ in the paired item count $m$ and the FP16-NF4 disagreement rate $ρ_d$. The bound turns "how reliable is my quantization claim?" into a one-line budget a benchmark designer can commit to before running. We illustrate the bound on four models and four benchmarks ($k=5$ splits of $n=100$), and add a parallel MMLU prompt-template study to put the bound's quantization-noise scale alongside the prompt-noise scale. Assuming $ρ_d=0.10$ (an unmeasured planning value), all observed NF4-FP16 deltas fall below the implied MDE, and most cross-split SDs lie within $\pm 1.5$ pp of the binomial reference $\sqrt{p(1-p)/n}$, so much of the variance reported as "benchmark unreliability" on $n=100$ subsamples is binomial sampling noise. The single borderline cell (OPT-WinoGrande, $|Δ|=3.2$ pp) is below the implied MDE at $ρ_d=0.10$ but above it at $ρ_d=0.05$, illustrating the planning trade-off the bound makes explicit. On MMLU, prompt-template ranges of 2-10 pp meet or exceed the largest observed quantization delta (3.2 pp), so a quantization audit that does not first fix the prompt template absorbs template variance into its noise floor. We complement the bound with a five-line pre-registration template.

</details>


### [428] [Towards Continuous-time Causal Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28880)
*Dennis Thumm,Ruben Wiedemann,Ying Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出将离散时间因果先验数据拟合网络扩展到连续时间，通过随机微分方程实现，并提出轨迹律对观测时间表不变性的精确连续性准则，以及三层分类法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离散时间因果先验网络扩展至连续时间时，若SDE仅每次观测间隔积分一次，轨迹律会依赖观测时间，导致先验仍是离散时间马尔可夫模型，需要更精确的连续性定义。

Method: 提出轨迹律对观测时间表不变性的连续性准则及三层分类法（离散、朴素观测网格积分、细网格积分+解耦观测），并在随机DAG上使用OU或小MLP非线性漂移实现顶层，支持不规则观测和多种干预。

Result: 2×2编码器×积分器消融实验表明，细网格积分在8/8个单元格上优于朴素积分（符号一致性p<1/256），且差距随评估网格细化而扩大；编码器维度在细积分下无效，在朴素积分下需时间感知编码。

Conclusion: 细网格积分策略在连续时间因果先验网络中显著优于朴素积分方法，并在药代动力学和物理系统数据上展示了初步的零样本预测能力。

Abstract: Extending discrete-time causal Prior-data Fitted Networks for time series to continuous time invites writing the mechanism as a stochastic differential equation (SDE) -- but if the SDE is integrated \emph{once per observation gap}, the trajectory law depends on when it is observed, and the prior remains a discrete-time Markov model in SDE clothing.
  We propose a precise continuity criterion -- trajectory-law invariance to the observation schedule -- together with a three-tier taxonomy (discrete; naive observation-grid integration; fine-grid integration with decoupled observation) and a construction realising the top tier on a random DAG with OU or small-MLP nonlinear drifts, irregular observation schedules, and hard / soft / time-varying interventions.
  A $2 \times 2$ encoder $\times$ integrator ablation, run independently on a linear and a nonlinear prior, finds fine-grid integration beats naive on 8/8 cells (sign-consistency $p < 1/256$) with the gap growing as the eval grid refines; the encoder axis is null with fine integration but time-aware-leading with naive.
  We release the prior and a preliminary zero-shot protocol on pharmacokinetic and physical-system data.

</details>


### [429] [Context Distillation as Latent Memory Management](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28889)
*Ziyang Zheng,Zeju Li,Xiangyu Wen,Jianyuan Zhong,Junhua Huang,Lei Chen,Mingxuan Yuan,Qiang Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出将上下文蒸馏转化为潜在记忆管理问题，通过独立LoRA适配器构建记忆库，并引入Self-Gating机制决定是否激活记忆，同时采用缓存共享提升效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有上下文蒸馏方法忽略了多个蒸馏记忆应如何存储、检索及在非理想环境下安全激活的问题。

Method: 将每个上下文蒸馏为独立LoRA适配器形成模块化记忆库；检索候选记忆并路由查询；Self-Gating机制控制记忆激活；缓存共享降低推理开销。

Result: 该方法显著优于带检索的基线方法，Self-Gating通过停用不必要的潜在记忆提升了鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 将上下文蒸馏形式化为记忆管理问题，模块化存储与选择性激活是提升性能与鲁棒性的有效途径。

Abstract: Context distillation compresses contextual information into model parameters, yet existing methods often ignore how multiple distilled latent memories should be stored, retrieved, and safely activated in non-oracle settings. We formulate context distillation as a latent memory management problem. We distill each context into an independent LoRA adapter, forming a modular memory bank that enables explicit memory selection. Given a query, our framework retrieves candidate memories, routes the query to the most suitable adapter, and uses a Self-Gating mechanism to decide whether latent memory should be activated. To improve efficiency, we further introduce cache sharing to reduce management overhead during inference. Experiments show that our method substantially outperforms baselines with retrieval, while Self-Gating improves robustness by deactivate unnecessary latent memories.

</details>


### [430] [Feature Geometry of LoRA Adapters: A Sparse Autoencoder Analysis of Representational Divergence in Fine-Tuned Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28896)
*Prasanth K K*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了LoRA微调引起的表示几何变化，使用稀疏自编码器（SAEs）分析发现LoRA诱导的特征字典与预训练SAE特征之间存在较弱的几何对齐，表明LoRA更新在残差流中占据部分独特的表示结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LoRA微调已被广泛使用，但其引起的内部表示变化尚未被充分理解，因此需要探究LoRA对模型表征几何结构的影响。

Method: 提出delta激活框架分离适配器贡献；在Gemma-2-9B模型上使用LoRA秩4/8/16/32，训练适配器专属SAE；通过余弦相似度、主角度分析和CKA评估特征空间对齐。

Result: LoRA特征字典与预训练SAE特征间几何对齐较弱；适配器专属SAE能更有效重建delta激活；特征密度随秩和深度增加而增加，几何差异在各秩间保持稳定。

Conclusion: LoRA微调会诱导出预训练可解释性词典无法完全捕捉的特征结构，对机制可解释性、适应分析和安全审计具有启示意义。

Abstract: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) has emerged as a widely adopted approach for adapting large language models, yet the internal representational changes induced by LoRA fine-tuning remain insufficiently understood. In this work, we investigate the geometry of LoRA-induced representations using Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs). We introduce a delta activation framework that isolates the adapter-specific contribution to the residual stream.
  Using Gemma-2-9B with LoRA ranks 4, 8, 16, and 32, we train adapter-specific SAEs across multiple transformer layers and compare their learned feature spaces with pretrained SAE dictionaries. We evaluate representational alignment using cosine similarity between decoder directions, principal-angle analysis of feature subspaces, and Centered Kernel Alignment (CKA) between activation representations.
  Across layers and ranks, we consistently observe comparatively weak geometric alignment between LoRA-induced feature dictionaries and pretrained SAE features. Adapter-specific SAEs also reconstruct delta activations more effectively than pretrained SAEs, suggesting that LoRA updates occupy partially distinct representational structure within the residual stream. Additionally, feature density increases with rank and depth, while geometric divergence remains relatively stable across ranks.
  These findings provide empirical evidence that LoRA fine-tuning can induce feature structures that are not fully captured by pretrained interpretability dictionaries, with implications for mechanistic interpretability, adaptation analysis, and safety auditing of fine-tuned language models.

</details>


### [431] [Spectral Guidance for Flexible and Efficient Control of Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28900)
*Gabriel Moreira,Manuel Marques,João Paulo Costeira,Chenyan Xiong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出 Spectral Guidance 框架，通过利用生成过程的固有几何结构（条件期望算子的奇异函数）实现扩散模型的控制，无需重训练或反向传播，在 CIFAR-10 上准确率提升 37 个百分点，速度提升 4 倍，并支持多种引导信号（标签、CLIP、掩码）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散模型的控制方法要么需要重训练，要么在采样时进行昂贵的去噪器反向传播。作者希望找到一种无需重训练、无需反向传播的高效控制方式，并利用数据在扩散过程中固有几何结构实现稳定、高保真的引导。

Method: 通过定义条件期望算子，提取其奇异函数作为生成过程中保持信息量的特征基。该基可通过自监督目标学习得到。得到该基后，可将任意引导信号（标签、CLIP嵌入、掩码等）直接投影到采样轨迹上，实现无需重训练或反向传播的控制。

Result: 在 CIFAR-10 上，条件准确率比最强无训练基线提升 37 个百分点，采样速度提升 4 倍。同一套表示同时支持标签、CLIP 和掩码引导等多种控制，无需辅助模型。此外，框架揭示了生成过程中的相变，找到了有效引导的最优时间窗口。

Conclusion: Spectral Guidance 是一种高效、通用的扩散模型控制框架，利用生成过程的几何结构实现多模态控制，显著提升性能与速度，并为理解扩散模型的引导时序提供了理论洞见。

Abstract: We introduce Spectral Guidance, a framework for controlling diffusion models by leveraging the intrinsic geometry of the generative process. As data is progressively corrupted by noise, only a small number of features remain informative for control. We characterize them as the singular functions of a conditional expectation operator and show that they can be learned via a self-supervised objective. Once recovered, this basis enables the projection of arbitrary guidance signals, such as labels, CLIP embeddings, or masks, directly onto the sampling trajectory. This approach allows for stable, high-fidelity control without retraining or denoiser backpropagation during sampling. Empirically, we improve conditional accuracy on CIFAR-10 by 37 percentage points over the strongest training-free baseline while offering $4\times$ faster sampling. Moreover, the same representations that support label and CLIP guidance also enable spatial control, such as mask-based guidance, without auxiliary models. Finally, our framework reveals a phase transition in the generative process, pinpointing the optimal time window for effective guidance.

</details>


### [432] [Sequential Physics-Constrained Neural Operator Forward Modeling for the $\textit{Norne}$ Reservoir System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28909)
*Clement Etienam,Juntao Yang,Oleg Ovcharenko,Nick Luiken,Tsubasa Onishi,Nefeli Moridis,Issam Said*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文构建了基于神经算子（FNO/PINO）的三相黑油油藏顺序代理建模数学与计算框架，在Norne基准油藏（11.3万网格，30个时间步）上实现了全自动回归预测：油相R²>0.99、气相R²>0.90、压力R²≈0.80，8块B200 GPU训练不到1小时，千成员集成在单GPU上1分钟内完成，比传统有限体积模拟器快约10000倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统油藏数值模拟（如OPM有限体积法）计算成本极高，难以支撑大规模不确定性量化与历史匹配等需要大量运行的任务。目前将神经算子应用于油藏代理建模缺乏严格的数学理论支撑，特别是针对长时程自回归预测中的误差累积、分布漂移以及物理约束下的稳定性问题。

Method: (1) 在乘积Sobolev空间中对隐式时间步映射进行泛函分析，给出适定性和局部Lipschitz估计；(2) 量化协变量偏移，证明Wasserstein-2距离的指数增长上界；(3) 物理约束谱稳定性分析，推导PINO训练中Jacobian谱半径的控制条件，实现时间一致性的rollout误差界；(4) K步TBPTT梯度分析，给出最优截断窗口和Adam收敛速率。

Result: 全自动回归PINO代理模型在3298天预测范围内：油相R²>0.99、气相R²>0.90、压力R²≈0.80、水相R²单调提升。8块B200 GPU训练<1小时，1000成员集成在单B200上1分钟内完成，相比OPM有限体积模拟器获得约10^4倍加速比。

Conclusion: 该工作首次为神经算子驱动的油藏代理建模提供了完整的数学理论支撑（稳定性、误差传播、优化收敛），并在大规模实际油藏数据上验证了理论预测，证明了PINO在长时程高保真油藏模拟中的实用性和极强加速能力。

Abstract: We develop a comprehensive mathematical and computational framework for sequential surrogate modeling of three-phase black-oil reservoir dynamics using neural operators, with particular emphasis on Fourier Neural Operators (FNO) and their physics-informed variant (PINO). The application focus is the Norne benchmark reservoir, defined on a heterogeneous $46\times112\times22$ grid ($N=113,344$ cells), with a production history spanning $T=30$ timesteps covering 3298 days. Our theoretical contributions are organized around four interlocking problems: (1) functional-analytic formulation in a product-Sobolev-space setting, including well-posedness of the implicit timestep map and sharp local Lipschitz estimates; (2) covariate shift quantification, proving that the Wasserstein-2 distance grows as $W_2 \leq \varepsilon(L^n-1)/(L-1)$, with exponential population-risk discrepancy for $L>1$; (3) physics-constrained spectral stability, showing PINO training with $λ_R \geq λ^*_R$ reduces the learned Jacobian spectral radius to $ρ_F + Cλ_R^{-1/2}$, yielding uniform-in-time rollout error $|δ_n| \leq \varepsilon/(1-ρ)$; and (4) $K$-step TBPTT gradient analysis, deriving geometric bias decay $O(ρ^K)$, optimal window $K^ = O(\log(T/σ^2))$, and Adam convergence $O(1/\sqrt{t}) + O(ρ^{K^*})$. Empirical validation confirms all theoretical predictions: autoregressive PINO surrogates sustain $R^2>0.99$ (oil), $R^2>0.90$ (gas), $R^2\approx 0.80$ (pressure), and monotonically improving $R^2$ (water) across the full 3298-day horizon, trained on eight NVIDIA B200 GPUs in under one hour. A 1000-member ensemble runs in under one minute on a single B200 GPU, giving a ${\sim}10^4\times$ wall-clock speedup over the OPM finite-volume simulator.

</details>


### [433] [Cycle-Space Informed Detection of Autoencoded Blind False Data Injection Attacks on Power Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28912)
*Xin Li,Chenhan Xiao,Jonathan Cohen,Aviad Elyashar,Yang Weng,Rami Puzis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于拓扑循环空间的虚假数据注入攻击检测方法（CSD），利用电网的最小循环基（MCB）增强检测鲁棒性，有效应对数据驱动的盲FDIA攻击。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的基于统计或数据驱动的检测方法在面对攻击者利用相同数据结构构造的隐蔽扰动时容易失效，亟需一种不依赖精确线路参数且能利用拓扑结构约束的检测方法。

Method: 提出拓扑感知的循环空间检测器（CSD），利用网络的Cycle-Space施加结构约束以增强零空间估计；通过最小循环基（MCB）实现检测的最优泛化误差。

Result: 在IEEE 14、30、57、118节点系统上的仿真结果表明，CSD在存在实际测量噪声的情况下能够有效检测数据驱动的FDIA。

Conclusion: CSD通过拓扑导出的循环约束而非仅依赖数值零空间估计，不要求精确线路参数，且能更好地区分正常测量与受攻击测量，为电力系统FDIA检测提供了新的稳健方案。

Abstract: The rapid growth of AI-driven data centers and large-scale energy storage systems is increasing the reliance of power system operation on real-time measurement data and automated decision-making. However, many existing detection methods rely on statistical or data-driven analysis of measurements and can fail when attackers exploit the same data structure to craft stealthy perturbations. To illustrate this limitation, we demonstrate a blind False Data Injection Attack (FDIA) in which an Autoencoder learns the measurement manifold and generates perturbations aligned with the Jacobian null space, thereby allowing the attack to evade both residual-based baddata detectors and time-series anomaly detectors. To mitigate data-driven FDIAs which exploit the null space, we propose a topology-informed Cycle-Space Detector (CSD) that leverages the Cycle-Space of the network to impose structural constraints that enhance null space estimation. In addition, we prove that by using the Minimum Cycle Basis (MCB), the proposed CSD achieves the optimal generalization error for attack detection. By exploiting topology-derived cycle constraints rather than relying solely on numerical null space estimation, the proposed method does not require precise line parameters and improves the separation between normal and attacked measurements. Simulation results on IEEE 14-, 30-, 57-, and 118-bus systems demonstrate that the proposed method effectively detects data-driven FDIAs under realistic measurement noise.

</details>


### [434] [When LLM Reward Design Fails: Diagnostic-Driven Refinement for Sparse Structured RL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28918)
*Youting Wang,Yuan Tang,Bowen Liu,Xuan Liu,Dingyan Shang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出将LLM生成的奖励塑形问题从一次性生成重新框架为迭代调试过程，通过诊断驱动的精细化改进，在稀疏结构化强化学习任务中取得了显著效果提升，并揭示了该方法的应用边界和局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对稀疏结构化强化学习任务中LLM生成奖励函数的失败模式（奖励泛滥、语义/API误解、弱塑形），提出将奖励塑形视为迭代调试过程而非一次性生成，以系统性地解决这些问题。

Method: 提出诊断驱动迭代精细化方法：基于训练诊断指标和失败模式分类法，引导LLM对奖励函数进行针对性修订。采用MiniGrid作为核心评估环境，MuJoCo作为边界压力测试。设计了消融实验和对照实验（纯指标重提示、静态词汇控制、预算匹配、Best-of-3等）来分离各组件贡献。

Result: DoorKey-8x8从2.3%提升至97.6%，KeyCorridor从31.2%提升至86.7%；静态词汇控制恢复了大部分差距（87.6%；70.7%），表明分类法提示是主要机制；连续控制任务中基于成功率的诊断在密集奖励场景下可能失效。

Conclusion: 该方法有效但存在明确边界：适用于稀疏结构化任务与可靠接口下的PPO训练；分类法提示是主要贡献机制，动态标签提供增量证据有限；连续控制等密集奖励场景下诊断可能误判；该方法不是基于种群的奖励搜索的基准替代方案。

Abstract: For sparse, structured reinforcement-learning tasks with semantic reward-function interfaces, LLM-generated reward shaping is better framed as debugging than one-shot generation. We study PPO-trained agents using MiniGrid as core evaluation and MuJoCo as boundary stress test. Our audit finds two dominant one-shot failure modes -- reward flooding and semantic/API misunderstanding -- plus a rarer weak-shaping case. We propose diagnostic-driven iterative refinement, where training diagnostics and a failure-mode taxonomy guide targeted reward-function revision. Refinement improves DoorKey-8x8 from 2.3% to 97.6% and KeyCorridor from 31.2% to 86.7% with high seed-to-seed variance. Controls show these gains are not from retrying or extra training: metrics-only re-prompting yields large drops, while a static-vocabulary control recovers much of the gap (87.6%; 70.7%), showing the taxonomy prompt is a major mechanism and dynamic labels provide only partially isolated incremental evidence. Budget-matched and Best-of-3 comparisons separate refinement from selection and training-time effects. Component-removal tests, sensitivity analyses, and an audit against author labels provide converging evidence for the debugging interpretation while revealing calibration limits. Continuous-control results show the boundary: success-based diagnostics can misfire in dense-reward locomotion, and return-trend feedback removes one false-positive mechanism without robust gains. The low-call protocol is a cost contrast with population-based reward search, not a benchmark comparison. In four crossed-variance-design environments, point estimates suggest larger gains when LLM reward-function variance dominates but bootstrap intervals are wide. The method is bounded to sparse structured tasks with reliable interfaces under PPO; fields like event_text may help, hurt, or be neutral.

</details>


### [435] [CosmicFish-HRM: Adaptive Reasoning via Hierarchical Recurrent Mechanisms in Compact Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28919)
*Venkat Akhil Lakkapragada*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CosmicFish-HRM是一个紧凑型语言模型，通过分层推理模块（HRM）在推理时动态分配计算资源，根据输入复杂度自适应调整推理深度。实验表明模型学会了非均匀推理行为，在不同任务和输入上分配不同数量的推理步骤。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型虽推理能力强，但往往以巨大参数量和昂贵推理成本为代价。作者探索紧凑模型中自适应推理深度这一不同方向，旨在通过动态计算分配替代单纯依靠扩大参数规模来获取推理能力。

Method: 提出CosmicFish-HRM，核心是分层推理模块（HRM），通过高低两个级别的推理循环迭代，学习根据输入复杂度决定何时停止。模型还融合了Grouped Query Attention、RoPE、SwiGLU等现代transformer组件。

Result: 模型学会了非均匀推理行为，在不同任务和输入上分配不同数量的推理步骤。尽管小规模下推理基础设施引入额外开销，但随着模型规模增大，HRM核心的相对成本会降低，这种权衡将变得更有利。

Conclusion: 自适应推理深度可能为仅依靠参数规模获取推理能力提供一种有前景的替代方案。

Abstract: Large language models have achieved strong reasoning capabilities, though often at the cost of massive parameter counts and expensive inference. In this work, we explore a different direction: adaptive reasoning depth in compact language models. We present CosmicFish-HRM, a compact language model built around a Hierarchical Reasoning Module (HRM) that dynamically allocates computational effort during inference. Instead of applying fixed computation to every input, the model iterates through high-level and low-level reasoning cycles and learns when to halt based on input complexity. CosmicFish-HRM combines this adaptive reasoning core with modern transformer components including Grouped Query Attention, RoPE, and SwiGLU activations. While the additional reasoning infrastructure introduces overhead at small scale, we hypothesize that this tradeoff becomes increasingly favorable as model size grows and the relative cost of the HRM core diminishes. Our results show that the model learns non-uniform reasoning behavior, allocating different numbers of reasoning steps across tasks and inputs. These findings suggest that adaptive reasoning depth may offer a promising alternative to relying solely on parameter scale for reasoning capability.

</details>


### [436] [Conf-Gen: Conformal Uncertainty Quantification for Generative Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28920)
*Gabriel Loaiza-Ganem,Kevin Zhang,Wei Cui,Marc T. Law,Kin Kwan Leung*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Conformal Generation (Conf-Gen)框架，将共形预测和共形风险控制扩展到无监督生成模型（如LLM、图像生成器），提供了形式化的不确定性量化保证，并展示了在图像生成、对话系统和AI Agent等新领域的应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有共形预测（CP）和共形风险控制（CRC）主要面向监督学习，而近年来AI的突破集中在无监督生成模型（如LLM和图像生成器），两者之间存在兼容性鸿沟，亟需一个统一框架将共形方法扩展到生成任务。

Method: 提出Conf-Gen框架，通过调整CRC的理论假设来适应生成任务，统一并泛化了此前将CP应用于LLM的各种尝试，同时将共形方法论扩展到全新领域。

Result: 在三个新应用场景中展示了Conf-Gen的灵活性：图像生成器生成非记忆化图像、对话AI提出足够澄清问题、AI Agent输出正确结果，均获得了共形保证。

Conclusion: Conf-Gen成功将共形方法从监督学习扩展到无监督生成模型，为生成式AI提供了形式化的不确定性量化框架，具有广泛的应用潜力。

Abstract: Conformal prediction (CP) and its extension, conformal risk control (CRC), are established frameworks for quantifying uncertainty in supervised machine learning through formal guarantees. However, recent breakthroughs in artificial intelligence (AI) have been driven by unsupervised generative models, such as large language models (LLMs) and image generators, which are not directly compatible with CP or CRC. In this work we introduce conformal generation (Conf-Gen), a general framework adapting CRC to generative tasks while relaxing its theoretical assumptions. Conf-Gen unifies and generalizes previous attempts to apply CP to LLMs, and extends conformal methodology to entirely new domains. We demonstrate the flexibility of Conf-Gen through some novel applications, including obtaining conformal guarantees on: image generators producing non-memorized images, conversational AI systems having asked enough clarifying questions, and the output of AI agents being correct.

</details>


### [437] [A Training-Time Diagnostic for Generalization via the Log-Alignment Ratio](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28975)
*Ali Shehper,Ashish Vaswani*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出并研究了log-alignment ratio (LAR)，一种衡量参数-激活对齐程度的指标。LAR可通过权重奇异值分布p和激活在奇异方向上的投影分布q的重叠度来重新表述。研究发现：在grokking现象中，LAR可预测学习函数的有效维度；在大型语言模型预训练中，LAR的偏差可追踪泛化差距，其下降速度在过拟合临近时加快。LAR仅需前向传播中的信息，无需额外验证数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法难以在训练过程中有效区分记忆与泛化行为，且通常需要验证集数据。作者希望通过一种可计算、轻量级的对齐度量来捕捉模型从记忆到泛化的转变，并预测过拟合的发生。

Method: 将LAR重新定义为权重谱p（矩阵归一化奇异值的平方分布）与激活谱q（输入在奇异方向上的归一化投影平方分布）之间的重叠度量。通过两种实验验证：grokking任务中，LAR能预测有效维度k ≈ n^{2(1-LAR)}；在30亿参数语言模型预训练中，LAR偏离非过拟合基线的程度追踪泛化差距。

Result: 1) 在grokking中，LAR精准刻画了从记忆到泛化的转变，并能预测学习函数的有效维度。2) 在大模型预训练中，LAR偏离度与泛化差距高度相关，且其下降速率在过拟合临近时显著增加。3) LAR计算开销极低，仅需前向传播中已有的信息。

Conclusion: LAR是一个高效、可计算且无需验证数据的泛化监测指标，能够揭示神经网络从记忆到泛化的动态转变，对理解深度学习的泛化机制和早期预警过拟合具有重要价值。

Abstract: We study the log-alignment ratio (LAR), a measure of parameter-activation alignment, introduced in parameterization theory. We reformulate it as the overlap between a weight spectrum $p$ of the normalized squared singular values of a matrix and an activation spectrum $q$ of the normalized squared projections of inputs onto its singular directions. We show that unembedding LAR tracks the transition between memorization and generalization in two different settings by capturing the spread of $p$ and $q$ during training. In grokking, LAR predicts the effective dimension of the learned function: $k \approx n^{2(1-\text{LAR})}$, where $n$ is the input dimension of the matrix. In 3B-parameter language model pre-training, its deviation from a non-overfitting baseline tracks the generalization gap, and its rate of decline increases as overfitting approaches. LAR is computable from quantities available during the forward pass with negligible computational overhead, and requires no held-out validation data.

</details>


### [438] [Comparing Post-Hoc Explainable AI Methods for Interpreting Black-Box EEG Models in Depression Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28977)
*Antonia Šarčević,Nikolina Frid*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了多种后验可解释性方法（DeepSHAP、Integrated Gradients、GradCAM、Occlusion、Permutation Feature Importance）在基于InceptionTime架构的EEG抑郁症分类模型中的应用，发现不同方法在额叶、颞叶和后部脑区（尤其右半球）的归因有一定重叠，但也存在显著差异，强调了后验可解释性在精神疾病应用中的价值与局限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习在EEG-based抑郁症检测中取得了高准确率，但高容量模型的决策过程难以解释，阻碍了临床可信度与应用。本研究旨在通过多种后验可解释性方法揭示模型决策依据，评估不同解释方法的一致性与局限性。

Method: 采用InceptionTime架构训练EEG抑郁症分类模型，在受试者层面分层5折交叉验证框架下，应用Shapley-based（DeepSHAP）、gradient-based（Integrated Gradients、GradCAM）和perturbation-based（Occlusion、Permutation Feature Importance）五种后验可解释性方法，通过全局归因聚合分析EEG段和受试者的归因模式。

Result: 不同解释方法揭示了部分收敛的归因模式，额叶、颞叶和后部脑区（尤其右半球）被反复强调；梯度与扰动方法间具有较高一致性，而DeepSHAP产生相对独特的归因分布；方法间变异反映了方法学假设对解释结果的影响。

Conclusion: 不同后验可解释性方法捕捉到部分重叠的EEG深度学习抑郁症检测模型的相关性结构，归因模式与若干既往EEG研究一致，但应视为探索性分析，而非确切的神经生理生物标志物或临床证据。研究凸显了后验可解释性的有用性与局限性。

Abstract: Recent advances in deep learning have enabled increasingly accurate electroencephalography (EEG)-based classification of Major Depressive Disorder (MDD), but the decision-making processes of high-capacity models remain difficult to interpret. This study investigates multiple post-hoc explainability methods applied to an InceptionTime architecture trained for EEG-based MDD detection. The analysis includes Shapley-based, gradient-based, and perturbation-based attribution approaches: DeepSHAP, Integrated Gradients, GradCAM, Occlusion, and Permutation Feature Importance. Explainability analysis was performed within a subject-level stratified 5-fold cross-validation framework using global attribution aggregation across EEG segments and subjects. The evaluated methods revealed partially convergent attribution patterns, with recurring emphasis on frontal, temporal, and posterior EEG regions, particularly in the right hemisphere. Quantitative comparison demonstrated substantial agreement between gradient- and perturbation-based approaches, while DeepSHAP produced comparatively distinct attribution distributions. At the same time, variability between explainability methods highlighted the influence of methodological assumptions on the resulting explanations. Overall, the results suggest that different post-hoc explainability approaches capture partially overlapping relevance structures in EEG-based deep learning models for depression detection. Although the observed attribution patterns are broadly consistent with several previous EEG studies of MDD, the analysis should be interpreted as exploratory rather than evidence of definitive neurophysiological biomarkers or clinical applicability. The study highlights both the usefulness and limitations of post-hoc explainability for interpreting black-box EEG classifiers in psychiatric applications.

</details>


### [439] [The Hamilton-Jacobi Theory of Deep Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28983)
*Jose Marie Antonio Miñoza,Erika Fille T. Legara,Christopher P. Monterola*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明神经网络训练可精确对应为Hamilton-Jacobi初值问题的搜索过程，log-sum-exp层存在精确对应，残差网络、Transformer、RNN、LSTM、SSM等架构离散化同一类Hamilton-Jacobi方程，并引入单一变形参数ε统一网络、热带代数、粘性PDE和凸优化四个视角，导出泛化率、鲁棒性、反向传播、标度律和影响函数等定量结论。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 作者希望揭示神经网络训练与偏微分方程理论之间的深层对应关系，将梯度下降过程与Hamilton-Jacobi方程求解建立精确联系，从而利用PDE理论工具分析神经网络的行为，为理解泛化、鲁棒性、可解释性等核心问题提供统一的理论框架。

Method: 文章建立了神经网络训练与Hamilton-Jacobi初值问题的精确对应：每个梯度步选择粘性Hamilton-Jacobi方程的初始数据，通过Hopf-Cole传播子拟合观测。对于log-sum-exp层给出精确对应，对残差网络、Transformer、RNN、LSTM、SSM等架构给出结构对应（由Hamiltonian和粘性决定）。引入单一变形参数ε，在交换图中统一网络、热带代数、粘性PDE和凸优化四个视角，并在Lipschitz条件下闭合。

Result: 得到一系列定量结论：(1) 固定t时泛化率最优可达O(n^{-1/(d+2)})；(2) 对抗鲁棒性受ε控制；(3) 残差网络的反向传播对应Hamiltonian系统的协态方程（Pontryagin最大值原理）；(4) 标度指数与数据本征维数一致；(5) 影响函数为闭式O(N)形式（softmax归因权重π_j），其熵景观随ε增大发生折叠分岔，合并归因盆地。

Conclusion: 本文建立了神经网络与Hamilton-Jacobi方程之间深刻的理论联系，提供了一个统一框架来理解不同网络架构的共同数学结构。该框架不仅从理论上解释了神经网络的泛化、鲁棒性、可解释性等性质，还通过变形参数ε连接了多个数学视角，为深度学习理论提供了新的分析工具。

Abstract: In this paper, training a neural network is identified, exactly, as a search through Hamilton--Jacobi initial-value problems: each gradient step selects the initial data of a viscous Hamilton--Jacobi equation whose Hopf--Cole propagator best fits the observations; at inference, the input is the spatial point at which that solution is evaluated and the initial condition is already encoded in the weights. The correspondence is exact for log-sum-exp layers and structural for broader architectures: residual networks, transformers, and recurrent architectures (RNNs, LSTMs, SSMs) each discretize the same class of Hamilton--Jacobi equations, with architecture-dependent Hamiltonian and viscosity. A single deformation parameter $\varepsilon$ unifies all four perspectives (network, tropical algebra, viscous PDE, convex optimization) in a commutative diagram closed under Lipschitz conditions. Quantitative consequences include: the minimax optimal generalization rate $O(n^{-1/(d+2)})$ for fixed $t$; adversarial robustness controlled by $\varepsilon$; backpropagation as the co-state equation of the Hamiltonian system for residual networks (Pontryagin Maximum Principle); scaling exponents consistent with data intrinsic dimension via PDE quadrature; and a closed-form $O(N)$ influence function (softmax attribution weights $π_j$) whose entropy landscape undergoes fold bifurcations as $\varepsilon$ increases, each merging attribution basins.

</details>


### [440] [Learning Robust and Task-Invariant Functional Representation from fMRI through Siamese Self-Supervised Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28990)
*Jiyao Wang,Peiyu Duan,Nicha C. Dvornek,Lawrence H. Staib,Denis Sukhodolsky,Pamela Ventola,James S. Duncan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出BrainSimSiam，一种轻量级自监督学习框架，通过仅使用正样本对从fMRI数据中学习鲁棒且泛化的表征，在多个下游任务上超越全监督基线，接近大规模模型性能，特别适用于数据有限的神经影像应用场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: fMRI数据获取成本高、精神科评定量表主观性强导致样本量小、标签质量不稳定，加之fMRI数据维度高，模型容易过拟合。现有fMRI基础模型需多数据集联合训练，计算资源要求过高。

Method: 提出BrainSimSiam，一种数据高效的自监督表示学习框架，仅使用正样本对进行对比学习，无需负样本或大规模预训练，轻量级架构即可学习鲁棒且可泛化的特征表示。

Result: 学习到的表征在多个下游分类和回归任务中表现优异，超越全监督基线，性能接近大规模模型。

Conclusion: 轻量级自监督框架能够在数据有限的神经影像场景下有效学习泛化表征，降低了计算资源门槛，为小样本fMRI研究提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) is a powerful tool for investigating human brain function. However, the high cost of data acquisition and the inherent subjectivity of psychiatric rating scales often lead to datasets with small sample sizes and variable label quality, especially when targeting a specific neurological condition. Combined with the inherently high dimensionality of fMRI data, these limitations substantially increase the risk of model overfitting. Recent years have seen growing interest in developing fMRI foundation models by combining multiple datasets; however, the computational resources needed for pretraining and fine-tuning are often prohibitive. We show that a lightweight self-supervised framework yields representations that generalize across diverse downstream tasks, outperforming fully supervised baselines and approaching the performance of large-scale models. We introduce BrainSimSiam, a data-efficient self-supervised representation learning framework that leverages positive-only data pairs to learn robust and generalizable features. We demonstrate that the learned representations achieve strong performance across multiple downstream classification and regression tasks, highlighting the potential of BrainSimSiam for data-limited neuroimaging applications.

</details>


### [441] [FormInv: A Measurement Protocol for Semantic Invariance in Mathematical Reasoning Benchmarks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29001)
*Nishal Thomas,Noel Thomas*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 对MathCheck（ICLR 2025）的释义质量审计发现3.1%的语义错误，这些错误足以改变模型排名。跨模型一致性协议可自动检测这些错误，且发现47%的自动生成连接变体释义存在语义错误。论文揭示了语义一致性率（SCR）与准确率之间的巨大差距（如Claude Haiku准确率86%但SCR仅50%），并提出了No-Free-Benchmark推论：基准设计者选择释义族等同于选择哪个模型获胜。FormInv提供了审计协议、SCR和Cochran's Q等不变性度量工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准测试中的释义质量未被充分审计，语义不正确的释义可能扭曲模型排名。同时，标准准确率指标无法反映模型在语义等价重述下答案的一致性，存在测量盲区。

Method: 跨模型一致性审计协议（至少3/4模型达成一致检测MathCheck错误，至少6/9用于主要评估）；引入语义一致性率（SCR）和Cochran's Q作为不变性度量；提出No-Free-Benchmark推论证明不存在帕累托主导所有释义族的模型。

Result: MathCheck中3.1%的释义语义错误导致GPT-4o从第2名跌至第4名；自动生成连接变体释义中47%语义不正确；SCR与准确率之间存在32个百分点的差距（50-82% vs 86-96%）；FormInv协议在外部基准上达到100%召回率。

Conclusion: 标准基准测试存在系统性测量缺陷——释义质量问题和语义一致性盲区。FormInv提供了低成本、可复现的审计协议和不变性度量，帮助研究者在不同释义族间进行有意识的模型选择，避免隐性排名操纵。

Abstract: A paraphrase-quality audit of MathCheck (ICLR 2025) detected 4 semantically incorrect paraphrases in 129 groups (3.1%); removing them drops GPT-4o from rank 2 to rank 4 and elevates Claude Haiku and DeepSeek V3 above it; these ranking changes are invisible to any single-model evaluation. Cross-model unanimity found these errors automatically (>= 3/4 models for MathCheck; >= 6/9 for our primary evaluation) for under $10; in our own dataset the same protocol found that 47% of auto-generated connective-variation paraphrases were semantically incorrect. That flaw compounds a deeper measurement gap: Claude Haiku 4.5 achieves 86% accuracy yet SCR=50%, meaning half its theorems are answered differently under semantically equivalent restatements, while aggregate accuracy across 9 models spans only 86-96% yet Semantic Consistency Rates (SCR) span 50-82% -- a 32-point gap invisible to standard benchmarks. Formally, for any target ranking over 9 frontier models there exists a weighting over paraphrase families that realizes it (No-Free-Benchmark corollary), because no model Pareto-dominates all families -- so benchmark designers who select families are implicitly choosing which model wins. FormInv supplies the audit protocol (replicated on external benchmarks at 100% recall), SCR and per-theorem Cochran's Q as primary invariance measures evaluated on 9 models across 366-811 items (on Lean4-verified theorems), and FormInvSelector for regime-aware model selection.

</details>


### [442] [FedQHD: Closed-Form Function-Space Federated Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29002)
*Yuchen Hou,Yongshan Chen,Zhuowen Zou,Calvin Yeung,Mohsen Imani,Tian Lan,Mahdi Imani*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出FedQHD，一种使用超维随机特征编码器的联邦Q学习方法，通过线性读出层实现函数空间一致的聚合，并形式化分析了联邦差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: FedAvg风格的参数平均在函数空间上不一致：当客户端使用异构编码器或相同的非线性网络时，平均参数不一定对应于任何公共函数空间中客户端价值函数的加权平均。

Method: 使用超维（随机特征）状态编码器配合线性读出层，使Q函数在状态上非线性但在可训练参数上线性。共享编码器时可直接加权平均；异构编码器时服务器在共享锚点状态集上平均客户端Q值构建全局教师，客户端通过岭回归投影到本地表示。

Result: 在四个连续状态、离散动作的控制基准上，FedQHD匹配或超越FedAvg风格基线和蒸馏替代方法，同时计算量显著更低；联邦差距对编码器维度的经验依赖与理论分析一致。

Conclusion: 形式化了联邦差距，将其分解为子空间错位、锚点集条件和正则化偏差，并识别出锚点与维度比m≥D_i为良态区域，此时差距简化为编码器异质性底数倍数。

Abstract: Federated reinforcement learning enables decentralized agents to collaboratively improve policies or value estimates without exchanging raw trajectories. However, FedAvg-style parameter averaging is not function-space consistent: when clients use heterogeneous encoders or even identical nonlinear networks, averaged parameters need not correspond to the weighted average of client value functions in any common function space. We propose FedQHD, a federated Q-learning method using hyperdimensional (random-feature) state encoders with a linear readout, so that Q-functions are nonlinear in state yet linear in trainable parameters. This linear structure enables closed-form aggregation. With a shared encoder, the function-space consensus update coincides exactly with weighted averaging of local readout matrices. With heterogeneous encoders, the server constructs a global teacher by averaging client Q-values on a shared anchor-state set, and each client compiles this teacher into its local representation via a single ridge projection. We formalize the federation gap -- the error incurred when compiling a federated teacher into a heterogeneous client representation -- relative to a client-specific oracle projection. We show that this gap decomposes into subspace misalignment, anchor-set conditioning, and regularization bias. We further identify the anchor-to-dimension ratio $m \geq D_i$ as the well-conditioned regime in which the gap reduces to a multiple of the encoder heterogeneity floor. On four continuous-state, discrete-action control benchmarks, FedQHD matches or outperforms FedAvg-style baselines and distillation-based alternatives while requiring substantially less computation, and the empirical dependence of the federation gap on encoder dimension matches our theoretical analysis.

</details>


### [443] [LoRe: Adaptive Interaction-Evaluation Routing with Per-Step Interaction Budgets for Iterative Graph Solvers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29005)
*Jintao Li,Yong-Yi Wang,Zheng-An Wang,Heng Fan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LoRe是一种受多体物理计算启发、无需训练、推理时即插即用的方法，通过动态路由计算到高冲突/高不确定性交互，仅评估固定比例的交互，大幅提升扩散神经求解器在组合优化问题上的可扩展性（MIS任务3倍扩展、~8倍加速、~12倍显存降低；TSP任务~15倍加速、44倍显存降低），且保持解质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散神经求解器在推理时反复评估稠密的边/因子交互，导致计算和内存瓶颈，难以扩展到大规模问题。

Method: 提出LoRe：无需训练、推理时即插即用的方法，在每一步迭代中仅评估固定比例的交互，动态地将计算路由到高冲突或高不确定性的交互上，而非固定稀疏化（如静态kNN图或固定掩码）。

Result: 在MIS问题上，超过基线3倍的可扩展性、约8倍加速、约12倍峰值显存降低，且解质量保持。在TSP上（n=1000）约15倍加速、44倍显存降低，且竞争性的巡回质量；对拓扑变化具有零样本鲁棒性。

Conclusion: LoRe通过动态交互预算分配有效解决了扩散神经求解器的可扩展性瓶颈，在多个组合优化任务上显著提升效率，同时保持解质量。

Abstract: Diffusion-based neural solvers for combinatorial optimization repeatedly re-evaluate dense edge/factor interactions, making inference expensive in wall-clock time and often memory-bound at scale. Inspired by the computational methodologies of many-body physics, we introduce LoRe, a training-free, inference-time drop-in wrapper that enforces per-step interaction-evaluation budgeting: at each iteration, it evaluates only a fixed fraction of interactions by dynamically routing computation to high-conflict or high-uncertainty interactions, instead of using a fixed sparsification (e.g., static kNN graphs or static masks). Under fully inclusive end-to-end wall-clock accounting, LoRe substantially improves scalability on the Maximum Independent Set (MIS) problem, extending feasible inference more than $3\times$ beyond the baseline's out-of-memory limit, delivering a $\sim 8\times$ speedup and a $\sim 12\times$ peak-memory reduction, with solution quality preserved in this regime. Demonstrating cross-task generality on the large-scale Traveling Salesperson Problem (TSP) and zero-shot robustness to topology shifts, LoRe achieves a $\sim 15\times$ speedup at $n=1000$ with a $44\times$ memory reduction and competitive tour quality.

</details>


### [444] [Causal Intelligence for Constraint-Aware Intervention Design to Induce State Transitions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29008)
*Zixuan Song,Uwe Mueller,Dimitris V. Manatakis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: COAST是一个因果智能框架，通过约束干预设计实现系统状态转换，整合因果发现、结构因果模型和多目标优化，在合成和生物数据中识别关键因果驱动因素并生成可解释的干预策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有预测模型缺乏机制性见解和决策框架，难以通过目标干预驱动系统状态转换。

Method: COAST包含四个模块：特征选择、因果发现（学习上下文特定因果图）、结构因果建模、以及约束感知的多目标优化（平衡转换效果、干预复杂度和目标状态稳定性）。

Result: 在合成基准和真实生物数据上，COAST成功恢复关键因果驱动因素，识别出稳健的单目标和多目标干预策略，并提供透明的机制性解释。

Conclusion: 提出了一种模块化、领域无关的因果智能方法，可设计约束干预实现期望的系统状态转换，并附带可解释的机制性原理指导实验验证。

Abstract: Driving a system from one state to another through targeted interventions is a fundamental challenge in science, yet most predictive models offer limited mechanistic insight and no principled framework for decision-making. Here we present COAST (Causally Optimal Actions for State Transitions), a causal-intelligence approach for the in-silico design of constrained interventions that induce user-defined state transitions. Given data characterizing source and target states, COAST learns context-specific causal graphs and structural causal models, attributes observed distributional shifts to mechanism-level causal drivers, and introduces a novel constraint-aware multi-objective optimization formulation that balances transition efficacy, intervention complexity, and target-state stability. The approach is modular and domain-agnostic, integrating feature selection, causal discovery, causal modeling, and intervention identification and evaluation through interchangeable components. Across synthetic benchmarks and real biological datasets, COAST recovers key causal drivers and identifies robust single- and multi-target intervention strategies that achieve desired state transitions, accompanied by transparent mechanistic rationales to guide experimental validation.

</details>


### [445] [Label-Free Reinforcement Learning via Cross-Model Entropy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29009)
*Matt Gorbett,Hossein Shirazi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出跨模型熵（CME）作为无标签奖励信号，用独立验证器模型对生成器响应的平均对数似然替代自参考信号，实现无需人工标注或可验证答案的RL后训练，在开放式指令跟随任务上显著提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RL后训练依赖可验证奖励（限制领域）或人工偏好标签（昂贵且易被奖励破解），而无标签方法（如多数投票、token熵）使用模型自身输出作为信号，可能放大模型自身错误。

Method: 提出跨模型熵（CME），即生成器输出在独立验证器模型下的平均对数似然，作为连续、无需训练、不可被自我一致性利用的奖励信号，集成到GRPO框架中，适用于开放式指令跟随任务。

Result: 在UltraFeedback提示词、AlpacaEval 2.0评估下，CME奖励在四个模型家族（Qwen、Llama、Gemma、OLMo）和三种训练状态上，头对头LLM裁判对比均击败未训练基线，调整后胜率52.5%-71.4%。

Conclusion: CME将无标签RL扩展到开放式指令跟随领域，解决了自参考信号无法适用的问题，且无需修改训练循环。

Abstract: Post-training large language models with reinforcement learning is bottlenecked by the reward signal. Existing approaches require either ground-truth verifiable rewards, restricting training to domains with automatic correctness checks (e.g., mathematics, code execution), or human preference labels, which are expensive to collect and prone to reward hacking. Recent label-free methods replace ground-truth verifiers with self-referential signals like majority voting or token entropy over a model's own outputs, but risk reinforcing a model's own errors. In this work we propose Cross-Model Entropy (CME), the mean log-likelihood of a generator's response under a separate verifier model, as a label-free reward signal for RL post-training. CME is continuous, training-free, and grounded in the principle that responses a verifier finds unsurprising are likely correct or high quality. Because the verifier is independent of the generator, the signal cannot be gamed through self-consistency. We integrate CME into GRPO with no other changes to the training loop, extending label-free RL to open-ended instruction following -- a regime where self-referential signals are inapplicable or poorly suited. On open-ended instruction following (UltraFeedback prompts, evaluated on AlpacaEval 2.0), CME rewards beat the untrained base in head-to-head LLM-as-Judge comparisons across four model families (Qwen, Llama, Gemma, OLMo) and three training regimes (pretrained, SFT, and instruction-tuned), with tie-adjusted win rates ranging from 52.5% to 71.4%. Code will be released upon publication.

</details>


### [446] [Designing Active Tether-Net Systems for Space Debris Capture with Graph-Learning-Aided Mixed-Combinatorial Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29021)
*Feng Liu,Achira Boonrath,Gishnu Madhu,Eleonora M. Botta,Souma Chowdhury*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种图神经网络辅助的优化方法，将混合组合非线性规划（MCNLP）简化为非线性规划（NLP），用于同时设计绳网系统的网形态、机动单元质量和推进器选择以及控制器瞄准点，相比直接求解MCNLP显著加快了收敛速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 主动绳网系统是捕获空间碎片等大型非合作目标的有前景方案，但对其设计和控制选择的系统探索有限，主要是因为涉及连续、整数和类别变量的复杂混合组合非线性规划问题难以求解。

Method: 利用组合空间的图结构特性，训练图神经网络（GNN）对候选组合（图中节点）进行评分推荐，将MCNLP降维为NLP，再使用粒子群优化（PSO）结合梯度微调求解。

Result: 在绳网形态、机动单元质量和推进器选择以及瞄准点联合设计问题上，基于GNN的推荐方法相比直接求解MCNLP能显著加快收敛到相似最优解的速度。

Conclusion: 该图学习辅助优化方法有效处理了绳网系统中的混合组合非线性规划问题，为复杂工程设计中处理离散与连续混合变量提供了新思路。

Abstract: Active tether-net systems are a promising solution for capturing large non-cooperative targets, such as space debris, by deploying a flexible net manipulated by maneuverable units (MUs). However, concurrent systematic explorations of design and control choices of the tether-net system to understand its full potential remain limited, partly due to the complex, constrained, nonlinear optimization problem that it presents -- one that involves a mixture of continuous, integer and categorical variables, with the latter two arising from net connectivity and component choices, respectively. Classical binary encoding methods are often ineffective for solving highly nonlinear and multimodal Mixed Combinatorial Nonlinear Programmings (MCNLPs) in engineering design, while integer coding approaches can introduce spurious relations among combinations. Given the graph-structured characteristics of the combinatorial space, this paper adopts and extends a new graph-learning-aided optimization approach to solve this MCNLP problem. Here, a Graph Neural Network (GNN) is trained to score (as output) and thereof recommend candidate combinations represented as nodes in a graph, with the continuous variable vector portion of a candidate design given as input. As a result, the MCNLP optimization reduces to an NLP, which can be solved using standard solvers. While this reduction approach is agnostic to the choice of the NLP solver, here a state-of-the-art Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO) algorithm with gradient-based fine-tuning is used as the solver. Demonstrated on the problem of concurrently designing the morphology of the net, choice of mass and thrusters in the MUs and aiming points used by the controller of the tether-net system, the GNN-based recommender is shown to provide significantly faster convergence to similar optimal solutions, compared to direct solution of the MCNLP problem.

</details>


### [447] [Return-to-Go Is More Than a Number: Q-Guided Alignment for Return-Conditioned Supervised Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29028)
*Yuxiao Yang,Weitong Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Q-ALIGN DT通过让Q值与输入RTG对齐，改进了条件序列模型策略学习的可控性和性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CSMs将RTG当作简单数值输入，未与策略实际表现对齐，导致可控性差。

Method: 利用Q函数提供密集指导，并结合RTG扰动微调技术，确保高RTG映射到高期望回报轨迹。
